diffs.diff:
--- a/model.py
+++ b/model.py
@@ -57,7 +57,7 @@
         return self.features(x)

 

 class HMERModel(nn.Module):

-    def __init__(self, vocab_size, d_model=256, nhead=8, num_decoder_layers=4, max_len=150):

+    def __init__(self, vocab_size, d_model=512, nhead=8, num_decoder_layers=6, max_len=150):

         super().__init__()

         self.d_model = d_model

         

@@ -67,9 +67,9 @@
         self.embedding = nn.Embedding(vocab_size, d_model)

         self.pos_encoder = PositionalEncoding(d_model, max_len=max_len)

         self.pos_encoder_img = PositionalEncoding2D(d_model, max_h=64, max_w=256)

-        self.emb_dropout = nn.Dropout(0.1)

+        self.emb_dropout = nn.Dropout(0.2)

         

-        decoder_layer = nn.TransformerDecoderLayer(d_model=d_model, nhead=nhead, batch_first=True, dropout=0.1)

+        decoder_layer = nn.TransformerDecoderLayer(d_model=d_model, nhead=nhead, batch_first=True, dropout=0.2)

         self.decoder = nn.TransformerDecoder(decoder_layer, num_layers=num_decoder_layers)

         

         self.fc_out = nn.Linear(d_model, vocab_size)

--- a/predict.py
+++ b/predict.py
@@ -64,7 +64,7 @@
     

     vocab_size = len(vocab)

     max_len = 150

-    model = HMERModel(vocab_size=vocab_size, d_model=256, nhead=8, num_decoder_layers=4, max_len=max_len).to(device)

+    model = HMERModel(vocab_size=vocab_size, d_model=512, nhead=8, num_decoder_layers=6, max_len=max_len).to(device)

     model.load_state_dict(torch.load(args.checkpoint, map_location=device))

     model.eval()

--- a/train.py
+++ b/train.py
@@ -10,8 +10,8 @@
 

 def main():

     data_dir = '/data'

-    batch_size = 16

-    epochs = 40

+    batch_size = 24

+    epochs = 80

     lr = 5e-4

     max_len = 150

     

@@ -24,16 +24,22 @@
     val_loader = DataLoader(val_dataset, batch_size=batch_size, shuffle=False, num_workers=4)

     

     vocab_size = len(train_dataset.vocab)

-    model = HMERModel(vocab_size=vocab_size, d_model=256, nhead=8, num_decoder_layers=4, max_len=max_len).to(device)

+    model = HMERModel(vocab_size=vocab_size, d_model=512, nhead=8, num_decoder_layers=6, max_len=max_len).to(device)

     

     criterion = nn.CrossEntropyLoss(ignore_index=train_dataset.pad_id, label_smoothing=0.1)

     

-    optimizer = optim.AdamW(model.parameters(), lr=lr, weight_decay=1e-4)

+    encoder_params = list(model.encoder.parameters())

+    decoder_params = [p for n, p in model.named_parameters() if not n.startswith('encoder.')]

+    

+    optimizer = optim.AdamW([

+        {'params': encoder_params, 'lr': lr * 0.1},

+        {'params': decoder_params, 'lr': lr}

+    ], weight_decay=1e-4)

     

     total_steps = epochs * len(train_loader)

     scheduler = optim.lr_scheduler.OneCycleLR(

         optimizer, 

-        max_lr=lr, 

+        max_lr=[lr * 0.1, lr], 

         total_steps=total_steps,

         pct_start=0.1,

         anneal_strategy='cos'

@@ -82,7 +88,7 @@
             scheduler.step()

             

             if step % 20 == 0:

-                log_file.write(json.dumps({"step": step, "loss": loss.item(), "lr": scheduler.get_last_lr()[0]}) + '\n')

+                log_file.write(json.dumps({"step": step, "loss": loss.item(), "lr": scheduler.get_last_lr()[1]}) + '\n')

                 log_file.flush()

             step += 1
